name: DNC War Room
subject: re: the biggest political scandal in American history
body:

name: Democrats.org
subject: UPDATE: Trump to kick off re-election campaign
body:
We can't afford eight years of Donald Trump in the White House.
---
**Donald Trump is holding the first rally of his re-election campaign tomorrow. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help make sure Trump is a one-term president.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d736e/2907894232/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/One-Term-Trump-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")**
Friend --

Donald Trump has had a terrible, horrible, no good, very bad first month in office.

His National Security Advisor resigned over ties to Russia that are only raising more questions about the administration. His executive order on immigration was a very public disaster. His pick for Labor Secretary was pressured to withdraw after even members of his own party pulled their support. His new pick for National Security Advisor withdrew his name because of turmoil in the White House. Trump's approval rating is tanking. His White House is leaking like a sieve. He thinks the press is being too mean to him. He seems lonely.

And instead of putting in the work to fix his dysfunctional administration, Trump has been spending his weekends vacationing at Mar-a-Lago and sticking taxpayers with the bill.

So what better time to kick off his 2020 election campaign, right?

Trump is going to Florida for the third time this month -- this time for a campaign rally. There's no clear purpose other than stroking his fragile ego.

On the plus side, if it distracts him from the trouble he can get into by governing, then maybe it's not so bad.

But he's still the president. And we need to hold him accountable for everything he does between now and November 2020. Pitch in $10 or more today to help make sure we have the resources we need for what sounds like it's going to be a very, very long campaign.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d736f/2907894232/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-term-trump?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d736c/2907894232/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-term-trump?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d736d/2907894232/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-term-trump?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d736a/2907894232/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-term-trump?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d736b/2907894232/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-term-trump?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d7368/2907894232/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/One-Term-Trump-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1")
** Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d7376/2907894232/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d7377/2907894232/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c50a/4067b0a/2cb0d3a79/7e7d7374/2907894232/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&source=em_20170217_ew_v1s1&refcode=em_20170217_ew_v1s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?DonaldJTrump=2Ecom?=
subject: FW: I can't do it alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
You are our last line of defense against the media’s hit jobs. |

Friend, The President emailed you to take the urgent Mainstream Media Accountability Survey. Since then, mainstream media outlets have viciously attacked it... and thousands of Democrats have taken it to try to sabotage the results. Which is why we need your IMMEDIATE help as one of President Trump's biggest supporters. Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey now. >> Thanks, Team TRUMP ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Thu, Feb 16, 2017 at 3:00 PM Subject: I can't do it alone To: dpwillis67@gmail.com You know that I don’t trust the media to report on anything we achieve. Instead, you -- the American people -- are our last line of defense against the media’s hit jobs. You are our greatest asset in helping our movement deliver the truth to the American people. Which is why I need you to take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media’s attacks and deceptions. Over these next four years, our movement will be subjected to some of the nastiest attacks you can imagine. But just like during the campaign, we need to stay focused on getting the job done and accomplishing our shared goal to Make America Great Again! That’s why I’ve made it a point to cut through the media’s noise and go straight to the American people. It worked during the campaign, and it will work again over these next four years. But I can’t do it alone. I need you by my side, supporting our message and doing your part to get the truth to the American voter. Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media’s attacks and deceptions. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
TAKE THE SURVEY

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email

Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey now. >>

name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address
body:
Recap of Week 4. |
**Trump Administration This Week:
Rolling Back Harmful Regulations, Empowering Female Leaders, and Focusing on National Security **
This week, President Donald J. Trump continued to fulfill his promise to expand opportunities in America’s workforce by signing two bills that will roll back burdensome Obama-era regulations.

President Trump and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau met at the White House this week. They affirmed that ensuring equal opportunities for women in the workforce is a priority for both countries and announced the creation of the United States-Canada Council for Advancement of Women Entrepreneurs and Business Leaders.

On Wednesday, during a productive day with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, President Trump reaffirmed our unbreakable bond with Israel and vowed to strengthen the relationship between the two nations to continue fighting the threat of terrorism.

**To find out more, please follow[President Donald J. Trump](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df4d32a9d4bc679f68eb7741031fd6ac3345fbf443ff019ee4eeafe31661ce313f768f126e20b1de33a448df39d6cb0d638dab5dfd4cd2a1) and [The White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df4d32a9d4bc679f51b5455d4038b5fc3ca1b831b44ca0759481f278380f7d9bb936a1b0f106e9e02432bb817ed1bdc9bdc7310986abc5d2) on Facebook and [watch his weekly address.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df4d32a9d4bc679f6709b403c07b38fd2e27b82433eeeb90972a35e5b95a7ca52d3d04ee75fdeb9cfe9f6b97a10683c6f1848227601d28c2)**

**To get more involved, be sure to add your name to our[Support Empowering Female Leaders](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df4d32a9d4bc679f0b2987fcba1d7b2038e489b5474c90884275b32deeae57d064abaf295bb4b1b3a5bf6678c1ef4ed41e30968306957f57) and [Trump Stands with Israel](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df4d32a9d4bc679fdae46bf2f39e1839487ee96c221b99d95014028c356959ad582bb5091ab0ef4d052c84b4fefa3e19933c7a3ab4dffd76) petitions. **

Thank you for your continued support.

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df4d32a9d4bc679f2f3ed3e6a00301d28c758b151dbb87ecc899f298073fc84ad69c44f11e1d5d6231dc1937d6cf6a448d39141f9be12812) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a3722ad4eda0d13a40c0f926cefc51f50f9db95099699e9deb176de6aa69c3c2222a06e226a327eee329f2f4513aaec90bbd2ccde9a376a5)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=b92ce13652755ceaa0683c93cb737721b8473f77f93e6faaa292247257a0bb5669c2bd7ae05eb0c19294ed586d291dcc2d3c6b536c259ea4)

name: UPDATE (via FlaDems.com)
subject: it's tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
he's already running for re-election... | **TOMORROW:** Trump is set to hold his first re-election rally right here in Florida!

**SHOCKED?**

Us too - Trump hasn't even been president for 30 days, and he's already running for re-election.

Listen, with Trump announcing re-election campaign tomorrow, we've got to ensure that the second he takes the stage, Florida Democrats are fired up and ready to make sure that we expose the TRUTH (not alternative facts) about Trump's record.

That is why we need to make sure that we close the gap and hit our goal before Trump takes the stage, but we're not there yet.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: All about the future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
_**Chairman Hupfer Meets with Ball State College Republicans**_
Everyone has a passion when they are in college. For me, it was basketball. But for the students I met with at Ball State University last night, it's politics and public service. Every Thursday night they gather in the Letterman Building to hear from the current and future leaders of our Indiana Republican Party to learn about how they can best contribute to their towns, cities, state and country. I was inspired by their interest and engagement and know the future is bright with this group ready to take the helm! - Kyle
|
---
| **#EricOnTheRoad in Anderson**
Governor Holcomb [visited the Lemon Drop](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dce9ef9659&e=1acd9bb3d6) in Anderson recently to discuss two of his future-focused priorities - education and infrastructure - with diners. “I think we need to do even more than to encourage, but require our students be equipped with those proficiencies in science, technology, education and math," the governor said. In addition, he also attended the [opening of a new drug treatment facility](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3ec50bfa5b&e=1acd9bb3d6), Bridges of Hope, that can help treat up to 29 addicts at a time to get their futures back on track.
---
|
---
| | **Get to Know Our Executive Director of Political Strategy & Operations: Matt Huckleby**
Matt Huckleby had the unique experience of serving as political director for two gubernatorial nominees in the same cycle. He was first political director for then-Governor Mike Pence’s re-election campaign before transitioning into the same position with Eric Holcomb for Indiana following Pence’s nomination as the Republican candidate for vice president of the United States.

Prior to the 2016 cycle, Huckleby served as district director for U.S. Congressman Larry Bucshon, M.D., as well as being campaign manager of the Congressman’s political team. While a student at Indiana State University, he was appointed by Governor Mitch Daniels to serve as the student member on the ISU Board of Trustees. He has also served the Republican Party in a number of different capacities, including holding the position of southwest vice chair for the Indiana Federation of College Republicans and currently serving as the 8th District chair of the Indiana Federation of Young Republicans. Huckleby is a 2011 graduate of Indiana State University with a bachelor’s in political science.

You can contact Matt at [mhuckleby@indiana.gop](mailto:mhuckleby@indiana.gop) for all your political and operational needs.
Stay tuned to learn more about Chairman Hupfer's other senior staff hires in future newsletters.
---
|
---
| **Lugar Series Trains the Next Generation**
Do you know a young woman who is ready to make a big difference in her community? The [Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0288c90794&e=1acd9bb3d6) has partnered with the Indiana House Page Program for a FREE two-day training program aimed at inspiring the Next Generation of Hoosier leaders. Participants will get first-hand knowledge and experience in the legislative process and politics from some of the most accomplished women in Hoosier government and politics. Application can be found [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=039eb5b2f2&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **News You Can Use**
Senator Todd Young [discusses his 'constructive' discussions with key trading partner Japan](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b08ae49e99&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski [introduces resolution that would condemn lawfare against Israel](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f7f7313e9b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Congressman Todd Rokita [chats about an array of issues on FOX 59's IN Focus](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=829892dc05&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Congresswoman Susan Brooks [introduces bill to help veterans get the most from GI Bill](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dea1980307&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Congressman Luke Messer [issues statement on the U.S.-Israel relationship](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2b646e4f63&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Congressman Larry Bucshon [releases statement on Humana exiting Obamacare markets](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0917b7722f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| | |
---
**Congratulations to Congressman Trey Hollingsworth and his wife, Kelly, on the announcement that they will be adding a member to their family soon!**
| [Read More](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2da7d84db0&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| |
---

**President Trump made good on a campaign pledge to protect coal mining jobs by signing an Executive Order overturning a burdensome Obama-era rule.**
| [Read More](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b544028d4c&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| |
---
**Congressman Jim Banks filed his first bill this week. The bill would require DHS to inspect the social media accounts of those seeking visas to enter the U.S.**
| [Read More](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2667a76f81&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| | [ ](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db6f03f74e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/about?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=9ca752a9ce) [unsubscribe from this list](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=9ca752a9ce) [update subscription preferences](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. * 101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200 * Indianapolis, IN 46204 * USA

name: Jay Inslee
subject: SIGN ON: This isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We can't rest until this is over for good. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA0NTgyMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMTQzNDU2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| The fight is not over, friend. When the Ninth Circuit ruled to keep President Trump's discriminatory travel ban halted, we celebrated that victory -- for Washington state, and for the country. This victory proved that there are checks and balances in place for blatantly discriminatory actions, and that our current administration can't wildly usher through damaging plans without facing a real fight. But it isn't over. The Trump administration has announced plans to issue a new executive order, and they have made it abundantly clear that they will attempt to continue these discriminatory practices. That's why I'm joining with leaders across the country to urge the Trump administration to do what's right. And I need your help today. [**Tell the Trump administration today: Stop your efforts to put in place a discriminatory travel ban!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA0NTgyMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMTQzNDU2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) No matter what they say, we know that this effort is intended to keep Muslims and other targeted individuals out of our country, and that is unacceptable. There is only one way for the Trump administration to right this inconceivable wrong, and that is by dropping their efforts to ban travel. America is the land of the free, and Washington is proud to welcome refugees with open arms. But the Trump administration has refuted that. They have refuted our very Constitution and values. And we must stop at nothing until the ban is truly abolished. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SIGN ON »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA0NTgyMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMTQzNDU2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10458239&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTEwMTQzNDU2NgS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved, 2017.
PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://jayinslee.com/privacy) | | | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

clean_body: We can't rest until this is over for good. | The fight is not over, friend. When the Ninth Circuit ruled to keep President Trump's discriminatory travel ban halted, we celebrated that victory -- for Washington state, and for the country. This victory proved that there are checks and balances in place for blatantly discriminatory actions, and that our current administration can't wildly usher through damaging plans without facing a real fight. But it isn't over. The Trump administration has announced plans to issue a new executive order, and they have made it abundantly clear that they will attempt to continue these discriminatory practices. That's why I'm joining with leaders across the country to urge the Trump administration to do what's right. And I need your help today. No matter what they say, we know that this effort is intended to keep Muslims and other targeted individuals out of our country, and that is unacceptable. There is only one way for the Trump administration to right this inconceivable wrong, and that is by dropping their efforts to ban travel. America is the land of the free, and Washington is proud to welcome refugees with open arms. But the Trump administration has refuted that. They have refuted our very Constitution and values. And we must stop at nothing until the ban is truly abolished. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. . name: Team Trump-Pence
subject: Week 4: Strengthening our Alliances And Growing the Economy
body:
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=1)
---
### [ ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=2)
---
Peter, President Trump has been meeting with America's most important allies over the past week, reassuring them that our strong relationships will continue and discussing ways to make all of our nations great, whether by improving infrastructure or creating economic growth. In the past few days alone, the President used all the tools available to him to Make America Great Again including meeting with successful female entrepreneurs and top retail CEOs, and cutting red tape for American companies. Scroll down to learn about the President's busy week.
* * *
****THIS WEEK

****
* * *
**
**
* ****Promoting Alliances And Economic Growth With Japan

**** President Trump and Prime Minister of Japan Shinzo Abe held their first official meeting on Friday in Washington D.C. and affirmed their strong determination to further strengthen the U.S.-Japan Alliance and economic relationship. They both share an interest in sustaining a strong global economy, ensuring financial stability, and growing job opportunities. In addition, the two leaders expressed interest in exploring cooperation across sectors that promote mutual economic benefits to the United States and Japan.
* **Contributing To Economic Growth In Canada And The United States By Encouraging Women In The Workplace

** On Monday, President Trump met with Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau, marking the President's first official meeting of the two nations in the new administration. No two countries share deeper or broader relations than Canada and the United States. During their time together they hit on a range of topics, and highlighted women entrepreneurs and both countries' commitment to help women excel in the workplace. They held a round-table with several successful female business leaders with the goal of promoting the growth of women-owned enterprises and to further contribute to our overall economic growth and competitiveness, as well as the enhanced integration of our economies.

* **Cutting Red Tape For American Companies

** On Tuesday, President Trump signed legislation (House Joint Resolution 41) eliminating a costly regulation that threatened to put domestic extraction companies and their employees at an unfair disadvantage. The regulation created an unfair advantage for foreign-owned extraction companies. Thanks to new legislation eliminating that, this regulation intends to save American businesses as much as $600 million annually in regulatory compliance costs and spare them 200,000 hours of paperwork.

* **Meeting With Retail CEOs On The Front Line Of Our Consumer Economy

** President Trump met with top retail CEOs to talk about the economy and discuss how the White House could best support growth in our economy. The Administration remains focused on the issues that will encourage economic growth. President Trump told the CEOs that there is a large regulatory problem in our government and that he will work to reduce regulatory burdens and create more jobs. He also told them that reforming our tax code is important to him, as he believes it will help middle-income families and American businesses grow and thrive.**
**

* **Showing A Commitment To Our Children's Future

** President Trump and newly confirmed Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos participated in a parent-teacher conference listening session. President Trump has made it clear since his campaign that he wants every child in America to have the opportunity to climb the ladder to success. He wants every child to have a safe community and his administration is dedicated to helping our children get a great education, get into college, and ultimately become gainfully employed.

* **Standing With Israel
**
On Wednesday, President Trump met with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. With this visit, the President again reaffirmed the unbreakable bond with our cherished ally, Israel. This meeting reaffirmed the important U.S.–Israeli partnership, built on shared democratic values of freedom, dignity and peace.

* * *
Whether it's by meeting with our allies, meeting with economic leaders, or focusing on the education of our children, all of this will set America on a clear course to an even brighter future! Be sure to visit our Facebook page tomorrow as we live-stream President Trump's rally in Florida! You can go to our page now [by clicking here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=3) and liking it to be alerted when the event starts. We're in this together and we can't thank you enough for your continued support. **Team Trump-Pence** [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Flast-chance&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=4)
---
| | [
twitter ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FTeamTrump&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=5)
---
| [
facebook ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=6)
---
| [
instagram ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fteamtrumpofficial%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2172&n=7)
---

The regulation created an unfair advantage for foreign-owned extraction companies. Thanks to new legislation eliminating that, this regulation intends to save American businesses as much as $600 million annually in regulatory compliance costs and spare them 200,000 hours of paperwork. Meeting With Retail CEOs On The Front Line Of Our Consumer Economy President Trump met with top retail CEOs to talk about the economy and discuss how the White House could best support growth in our economy. The Administration remains focused on the issues that will encourage economic growth. President Trump told the CEOs that there is a large regulatory problem in our government and that he will work to reduce regulatory burdens and create more jobs. He also told them that reforming our tax code is important to him, as he believes it will help middle-income families and American businesses grow and thrive. Showing A Commitment To Our Children's Future President Trump and newly confirmed Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos participated in a parent-teacher conference listening session. President Trump has made it clear since his campaign that he wants every child in America to have the opportunity to climb the ladder to success. He wants every child to have a safe community and his administration is dedicated to helping our children get a great education, get into college, and ultimately become gainfully employed. Standing With Israel On Wednesday, President Trump met with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. With this visit, the President again reaffirmed the unbreakable bond with our cherished ally, Israel. This meeting reaffirmed the important U.S.–Israeli partnership, built on shared democratic values of freedom, dignity and peace. Whether it's by meeting with our allies, meeting with economic leaders, or focusing on the education of our children, all of this will set America on a clear course to an even brighter future! Be sure to visit our Facebook page tomorrow as we live-stream President Trump's rally in Florida! You can go to our page now and liking it to be alerted when the event starts. We're in this together and we can't thank you enough for your continued support. Team Trump-Pence** | | | | Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Visit our page to remove yourself from further emails. 725 5th Avenue · New York, NY · 10022 info@donaldtrump.com

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Official EMILY's List Membership Card + 2 🆓 stickers
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e11816/2701220770/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all")
---

Peter,

It's the last day to get a 2017 EMILY's List Membership in February!

By donating today, you're helping recruit, train, and elect pro-choice Democratic women who will always fight for reproductive rights. And today only, when you become a member, you'll get your card and a special bonus -- two free stickers!

**[Donate $3 before midnight to get your membership card and sticker pack.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e11817/2701220770/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+before+midnight+to+get+your+mem&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e11810/2701220770/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all")
An EMILY's List membership card is your way to show that you're supporting women like Sen. Elizabeth Warren, Sen. Kamala Harris, and Rep. Pramila Jayapal as they stand up to anti-choice Republicans and President Trump. Their voices are needed in Congress now more than ever.

We're including the bonus sticker pack today to make sure you show off that support or have something to share with friends who are ready to join the movement.

**Donate $3 before Membership Week ends at midnight to get your 2017 Membership Card and two free stickers:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/February-Membership-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e11811/2701220770/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFebruaryMembersh&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e11812/2701220770/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e11813/2701220770/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e1180c/2701220770/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c732b/24c69fd9/f72ec6ac/18e1180d/2701220770/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR218N_digital_email_20170217_MembershipLast_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
